body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Removes allocation of parameter combo struct Issue #975 
Closes PR #982 
Removes "minimum" computation by computing this once and storing it


## To-do
update benchmark times


## Content

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

labels.description: Add this label to run benchmarks on clima
labels.name: Run benchmarks

title: Remove `minimum` and close Issue #975
